title: Flipdarter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Flipdarters''' were small predators during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. One theory put forth as to why they were called flipdarters was when a larger predator appeared that they couldn't eat, the creature usually "darted" away.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}}

[[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]]
[[Category:Predatory creatures]]
[[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
